title: makefile: use -buildmode=pie
body:
The security benefits of PIC binaries are quite well known (since they
work with ASLR), and there is effectively no downside. In addition,
we've been seeing some weird linker errors on ppc64le that are resolved
by using -buildmode=pie.

Signed-off-by: Aleksa Sarai <asarai@suse.de>

comments.body: LGTM @mtrmac PTAL and merge if it's ok for you

ACK, but can you make it conditional on non-macOS, please?
```console
$ go build -buildmode=pie … -o skopeo ./cmd/skopeo
-buildmode=pie not supported on darwin/amd64
```
(This should show up as a failing test.)
@cyphar could you rebase this one and I'll merge
@runcom Is it time to release a new skopeo?

@rhatdan I release a new version just yesterday and asked Lokesh to rebuild already.

This patch is going to next release, probably end of next week

Yes I saw that after I asked the question.  :^(
I am preparing a skopeo release for Fedora.
